title: Fix ESP32-S3 Renode app execution
description: Discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.8. Heltec V3 and T-Deck bridge/gateway plus Heltec puck produce linked ESP32-S3 ELFs, but the skeletal Renode model loads low-address segments into unmapped ranges and never reaches UART or protocol oracles. Replace or correct address mapping and required peripheral/radio modeling so canonical application ELFs execute faithfully. Also ensure the ARM builder has the packaging dependency needed after linking.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Canonical Heltec V3 and T-Deck bridge/gateway ELFs load without unmapped segment failures and reach app-specific late runtime plus independent protocol/radio oracles. 2. Heltec puck reaches beacon/TX oracle. 3. ESP image packaging completes without missing intelhex. 4. Exact commands, hashes, and logs are retained; skeletal surrogate behavior is not presented as faithful evidence.
